3-0 today. And the night card is just getting started. 🎆

✅ Nats/Pirates Under 10.5
✅ Morocco ML
✅ Twins/Yankees Over 9.5

8-4 yesterday. +47u on the month. The roll is real.

Still on the board before the fireworks:

⚾ Orioles +109 (7:11 ET) — 7 proven winners, zero dissent, plus money
⚾ Astros ML (7:11 ET) — a +$2M career wallet fired 16× his usual size
⚾ Cards/Cubs Over 8.5 (8:09 ET)
⚾ Brewers ML (9:41 ET) — the nightcap

And France (6u) is live right now.

Lock in before 7:11, then go watch the sky.

The sharps don't take holidays. Neither do we.
